torch_pattern:
torch_input_nchw = input_tensor.permute(0, 3, 1, 2).to(torch.float32)
torch_output_nchw = torchvision.transforms.functional.rotate(torch_input_nchw, angle=float(angle), interpolation=InterpolationMode.NEAREST if interpolation_mode == "nearest" else InterpolationMode.BILINEAR, center=center, fill=fill)
torch_output_nhwc = torch_output_nchw.permute(0, 2, 3, 1).to(input_tensor.dtype)
applicability_notes: Fuses the NHWC->NCHW permute + torchvision rotate + NCHW->NHWC permute chain into a single ttnn.rotate operating natively on NHWC. Positive angle = counter-clockwise. center is (x, y) pixel coordinates.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.rotate(input_tensor, angle=angle, center=center, fill=fill, interpolation_mode=interpolation_mode); constraints: {'expand': 'must be False (only same-size rotation supported)', 'layout': 'input must be NHWC; ttnn op consumes NHWC directly (golden permutes to NCHW for torchvision, then back)', 'interpolation_mode': ['nearest', 'bilinear'], 'exactness': 'nearest mode with angle % 90 == 0 is bit-exact; bilinear validated via PCC >= 0.995'}

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(torch_input_nhwc, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, device=device) with default interleaved DRAM memory config

placement_observations.size_descriptor: same shape as input (expand=False, same-size rotation)
placement_observations.source: unit test: output read back via ttnn.to_torch with no explicit memory_config, default interleaved DRAM
